query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `deposits` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `contractId` int NOT NULL,
  `tenantId` int NOT NULL,
  `propertyId` int,
  `unitId` int,
  `amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `paidDate` date,
  `status` enum('held','partially_returned','fully_returned','forfeited') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'held',
  `deductions` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `totalDeducted` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `returnedAmount` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `returnedDate` date,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `unit_handovers` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `unitId` int NOT NULL,
  `propertyId` int NOT NULL,
  `tenantId` int,
  `contractId` int,
  `type` enum('check_in','check_out') NOT NULL,
  `handoverDate` date NOT NULL,
  `wallsCondition` enum('excellent','good','fair','poor') DEFAULT 'good',
  `floorsCondition` enum('excellent','good','fair','poor') DEFAULT 'good',
  `plumbingCondition` enum('excellent','good','fair','poor') DEFAULT 'good',
  `electricalCondition` enum('excellent','good','fair','poor') DEFAULT 'good',
  `acCondition` enum('excellent','good','fair','poor') DEFAULT 'good',
  `kitchenCondition` enum('excellent','good','fair','poor') DEFAULT 'good',
  `bathroomCondition` enum('excellent','good','fair','poor') DEFAULT 'good',
  `overallCondition` enum('excellent','good','fair','poor') DEFAULT 'good',
  `meterReadingElectricity` varchar(50),
  `meterReadingWater` varchar(50),
  `keysCount` int,
  `images` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `signedByTenant` tinyint(1) DEFAULT 0,
  `signedByCompany` tinyint(1) DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `internal_notes` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `entityType` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `entityId` int NOT NULL,
  `note` text NOT NULL,
  `createdBy` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sent_messages` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `templateId` int,
  `recipientType` enum('tenant','owner','broker') NOT NULL,
  `recipientId` int NOT NULL,
  `channel` enum('sms','whatsapp','email') NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `sentBy` int,
  `status` enum('sent','failed','pending') DEFAULT 'sent',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `daily_tasks` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `type` enum('collection','maintenance','inspection','contract','follow_up','other','payment_due','contract_expiring','custom') NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `entityType` varchar(50),
  `entityId` int,
  `dueDate` date NOT NULL,
  `priority` enum('low','medium','high','urgent') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
  `status` enum('pending','completed','dismissed','in_progress') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `assignedTo` int,
  `completedAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `documents` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `entityType` enum('owner','tenant','property','unit','contract','broker') NOT NULL,
  `entityId` int NOT NULL,
  `category` enum('deed','contract','id_copy','receipt','maintenance_report','inspection','license','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `type` varchar(100),
  `fileUrl` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `fileKey` varchar(500),
  `mimeType` varchar(100),
  `fileSize` int,
  `uploadedBy` int,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tenant_ratings` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tenantId` int NOT NULL,
  `contractId` int NOT NULL,
  `paymentScore` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 5,
  `cleanlinessScore` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 5,
  `complianceScore` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 5,
  `overallScore` decimal(3,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '5.00',
  `notes` text,
  `ratedBy` int,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `client_notes` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `leadId` int,
  `ownerId` int,
  `tenantId` int,
  `note` text NOT NULL,
  `noteType` enum('call','meeting','email','whatsapp','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
  `followUpDate` bigint,
  `createdBy` int,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `market_prices` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `propertyType` enum('apartment','villa','land','commercial','office','warehouse','building','farm') NOT NULL,
  `district` varchar(200),
  `city` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'المدينة المنورة',
  `avgPricePerSqm` decimal(10,2),
  `avgAnnualRent` decimal(12,2),
  `minRent` decimal(12,2),
  `maxRent` decimal(12,2),
  `source` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'تقدير السوق',
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL
);
